<!--
Status values:
  proposed   — Under discussion. Not yet binding.
  accepted   — Decided. Binding on all future work.
  superseded — Replaced by a later ADR. Keep for history.
  deprecated — No longer applies (problem went away, tool removed, etc.). Keep for history.

ADRs are permanent. Never delete one. To reverse a decision, write a new ADR that supersedes it.
-->
